sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The green container is back to the 3-wide state (cols 28-30), with red dot at (10,28). So clicking the left N-shape consistently shrinks the green container. I need to keep clicking it to fully clear the container.
But wait - I've been wasting actions. Let me think about this more carefully. The green container started at 5-wide and shrunk to 3-wide after one click. If each click shrinks it by 2 columns, then I need another click to get it to 1-wide, and then maybe one more to clear it completely.
Actually, let me reconsider the game mechanics. The pattern seems to be:
- Left N-shape in gray container → shrinks green container
- Right N-shape in gray container → expands green container
Similarly for the Y shapes:
- One Y shape → shrinks yellow bar
- Other Y shape → expands yellow bar
So the goal is to click the "shrink" shapes repeatedly until all containers are cleared. Let me keep clicking the left N-shape to clear the green container, then move to the Y shapes.
But I've already used 5 actions and made a mistake by clicking the right N-shape. Let me be more careful now. Let me click the left N-shape a few more times to clear the green container.
